title: loasa arnottiana
intro: Loasa arnottiana, also known as the Lobelia, is a plant species native to New Zealand and Australia. It is a flowering plant that contains lobeline, a compound with medicinal properties, which has been used to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, and also has been used as a treatment for coughs and colds, thanks to its antitussive and mucolytic effects. Herbal preparations of Loasa arnottiana can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues.
